blockingIssues.description: Entity-derived geopolitical arcs still accumulate all occurrences from both countries after a single title-similar match, so unrelated stories can leak into the arc drilldown and violate VAL-QFIX-003.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document an explicit manual-review fallback when `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` Task launches fail, and have the orchestrator repair the reviewer droid's model configuration.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both required `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` Task launches in this quick-fixes validator run failed immediately with `Invalid model: custom:GPT-5.4-(XHigh)-3`, forcing manual review artifact creation instead of the intended subagent workflow.
